# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        config:
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend_service
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/"
                route:
                  cluster: service_a
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v2/"
                route:
                  cluster: service_b
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router

  clusters:
  - name: service_a
    connect_timeout: 0.5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 0.5s
      interval: 5s
      interval_jitter: 2s
      healthy_threshold: 3
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      tcp_health_check:
        send: { send: "ping" }
        receive: { receive: "pong" }
    hosts:
    - socket_address: { address: service_a_backend, port_value: 80 }

  - name: service_b
    connect_timeout: 0.5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 0.5s
      interval: 5s
      interval_jitter: 2s
      healthy_threshold: 3
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      tcp_health_check:
        send: { send: "ping" }
        receive: { receive: "pong" }
    hosts:
    - socket_address: { address: service_b_backend, port_value: 80 }
